'''Zeta Group''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] that fought for the forces of [[Empress/Legends|Empress]] [[Teta/Legends|Teta]] in the [[Battle of Kirrek (Unification Wars)|Battle of Kirrek]], during the [[Unification Wars (Koros)/Legends|Unification Wars]].

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 0|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 0]] {{1st}}

}}
